purpose: Maps pre-Lv94 (base) potencies vs post-Lv94 (mastery trait) potencies for level-scaled modeling
source_priority: 1. Official job guide (na.finalfantasyxiv.com/jobguide/) = current patch potencies (Lv100, post-all-traits)
3. Patch 7.0/7.1/7.2 history entries on wiki pages = delta confirmation

global_traits.note: These affect ALL damage actions. Pre-50: x1.0, 50-59: x1.1, 60+: x1.2. Baked into damage formula, not tooltips.

VPR.effect: Increases healing potency of Second Wind to 800
VPR.reason: New 7.0 job, potencies set at final values from launch

BLM.effect: Reduces Swiftcast recast time to 40 seconds
BLM.reason: Reworked for 7.0, potencies set at final values from launch

Upheaval.note: Only affected by Lv94 trait (not Lv84 Melee Mastery)

Drakesbane.note: Lance Mastery II (Lv86) sets potency to 400; Melee Mastery (Lv94) increases to 460. Skill added in patch 7.0.

Heavens' Thrust.note: Acquired at Lv86 via Lance Mastery II (upgrade from Full Thrust). Pre-94 potency was 140 (from 7.1 patch). Melee Mastery (Lv94) sets to 160.

trait_86.name: Lance Mastery II
effects: Upgrades Full Thrust to Heavens' Thrust
Upgrades Chaos Thrust to Chaotic Spring

Inferno.note: Demi-summon attack from Summon Ifrit II (Lv90). Pre-94 was 750.

Earthen Fury.note: Demi-summon attack from Summon Titan II (Lv90). Pre-94 was 750.

Aerial Blast.note: Demi-summon attack from Summon Garuda II (Lv90). Pre-94 was 750.

broil_chain.note: SCH's filler spell upgrades each expansion. Ruin II is an instant-cast weave, not main filler.

classification_framework.offensive_gcd: Standard GCD attack — fills the 2.5s slot, no dead-time risk
classification_framework.offensive_ogcd: Off-GCD attack on cooldown — use-or-lose if no charges, weave between GCDs
classification_framework.offensive_ogcd_charges: Off-GCD with charges — buffer against clipping; safe to hold briefly
classification_framework.offensive_spender: Requires resource (gauge/stacks/mana) — use-or-lose depends on overcap risk
classification_framework.offensive_burst: High-potency ability in burst windows — alignment-critical
classification_framework.offensive_dash: Movement + damage — DAMAGE FIRST, mobility second. CD forces use-or-lose
classification_framework.pet_summon: Auto-fires when summon is called — potency tied to summon timing, not player action
classification_framework.utility: Defensive/mobility/non-DPS — convenience for uptime optimization, not DPS-critical
classification_framework.dot: Damage over time — maintain uptime for sustained DPS, reapply before falloff

use_or_lose_rules: offensive_ogcd without charges: MUST use on cooldown or lose DPS
offensive_ogcd_charges: can hold 1 charge as buffer, but don't overcap
offensive_spender: use-or-lose only when resource would overcap
offensive_dash: treat as DPS ability first; movement is bonus
pet_summon: fires automatically on summon — DPS depends on summon ordering/timing
level_scaling_interaction: Skills below their unlock_level don't exist (can't model them)
Resource systems unlock at specific levels (e.g., Beast Gauge at Lv35)
Stacking resources (Polyglot @1 stack) create clipping risk until stack trait upgrades

enhanced_traits.description: Potency-modifying traits BEYOND the standard Lv94 mastery. Includes conditional buffs, earlier mastery tiers, and non-mastery potency increases.

categories.conditional: Potency increases only active under specific buff/condition
categories.non_mastery_potency: Enhanced/upgraded traits that bump damage at specific levels

Enhanced Meisui.effect: Bhavacakra potency → 500 while under Meisui buff
Enhanced Meisui.condition: Under the effect of Meisui (30s duration)
Enhanced Meisui.note: Meisui converts Ninki Gauge to Bhavacakra charges + this buff. Without Meisui, Bhavacakra is 400. WITH Meisui, it's 500.
Enhanced Meisui.model_note: Conditional sets ABSOLUTE value (500), not additive. Delta is larger at lower levels (150 pre-94 vs 100 post-94). In rotation modeling: Bhavacakra under Meisui is always 500 at any level >= 88.

Enhanced Jump.note: This is a Lv1 trait that establishes Jump's base potency (not technically an increase from a lower value)

Enhanced Wildfire.effect: Improves Wildfire's potency increase per weaponskill to 240
Enhanced Wildfire.note: Wildfire detonates for 240 potency per weaponskill landed during its window (up from 200 at Lv66)
